agreePrivacy: [Required] Agree to Collection & Use of Personal Info
agreeLocation: [Required] Agree to GPS & Background Location Collection
agreeMarketing: [Optional] Agree to Receive Push Notifications & Marketing Info
agreePrivacyBottomSheetTitle: Collection & Use of Personal Info Details
agreeTermsDetail:
Article 1 (Purpose) These terms regulate the usage of the 'Dibs Adventure' mobile game service.
Article 2 (Definition) 'Dibs Adventure' is a real-time location-based administrative area capture game.
Article 3 (User Obligations) Users must not spoof GPS or engage in faking location activities. Violating this will lead to immediate account termination and reclamation of all occupied territories.
Article 4 (Assets) Gold (GP) is a virtual game asset accumulated based on the territory count and duration, and can never be traded or exchanged for real-world currency.
agreePrivacyDetail:
1. Purpose of Collection: Sign up, user identification, permanent deletion, and customer support.
2. Collected Items: Email, nickname, profile color settings.
3. Retention Period: Upon requesting account deletion, all personal profiles, gold assets, and captured territory records are completely destroyed from the server DB instantly with a 100% cascade delete process.
agreeLocationDetail:
1. Purpose of Location Info: H3 hexagon mapping calculations for territory acquisition, main base distance calculations, and remote/move capture modes.
2. Background tracking: Accessing location in the background is required to secure territories even when the screen is off and to deliver real-time push notification alerts when another player captures your base.
agreeMarketingDetail:
1. Purpose of Collection: Customized push alerts regarding base status reports, remote recharge completion, and promotional events.
2. Decline Policy: You can decline receiving optional marketing alerts and still play the basic game without restrictions.
bgLocationSetupMessage:
This app is a real-time territory capture game.

To continue acquiring territory and succeeding in missions even when the screen is off or in the background, location permissions must be set to [Allow all the time].

Please change the location permission to [Allow all the time] in the settings screen.
bgNetworkSetupMessage:
This app is a real-time location-based administrative area capture game.

When the screen is turned off by the Android system power saving policy, territory capture and background satellite synchronization may be forcibly blocked.

Please exclude the app from battery optimization [Unrestricted] to ensure stable capture updates.
deleteAccountConfirmMessage: Upon deleting your account, all conquest data and earned gold assets will be completely destroyed, and immediate recovery is impossible. Additionally, all territories you occupied will immediately transition to neutral zones and be opened to other players. Do you really want to delete your account and resign as a player?
deleteAccountSuccess: The account has been permanently deleted. Thank you for playing.
modeMoveDesc:
🚶‍♂️ A play mode to capture territory by walking with real-time GPS location.

• Cost: Free of charge ($ 0)
• How-to: Instantly secures the grid under your feet into your territory (even if it belongs to another player).
modeRemoteDesc:
🔍 A remote mode to secure areas connected to your base or owned network.

• Cost: $ consumes relative to distance
• How-to: Tap a tile on the map and initiate remote capture.
languageSettingsSub: Change the display language of the app
languageChanged: Language has been changed to English.
languageChangedToKorean: Display language has been changed to Korean.
languageChangedToEnglish: Display language has been changed to English.
satGoldShortageDetail: Insufficient remote capture gold (Required: {required} GP / Owned: {current} GP)
termsAgreementRecordNotFound: Policy agreement record not found. Please try again.
requiredPolicyAgreementMissing: Required policy agreements are missing. Please try again.
guideAreaContent: The hexagonal minimum unit dividing the entire world's territory. Each area has unique coordinates, serving as the foundational asset that generates Gold when captured by players.
guideCaptureContent: Empty, unowned areas can be captured quickly. However, areas already owned by another player will require additional capture time proportional to that zone's cumulative capture count.
guideOverviewContent: Dibs Adventure is a real-time location-based capture game utilizing GPS coordinates to explore and capture areas around the entire world.
guideMoveModeContent: Physically move and capture the administrative hexagon tiles directly under your feet. Free of charge and optimal for rapid expansion.
guideRemoteModeContent: Establish remote links via your established Main Base or connected territories. Tap tiles on the map to trigger remote capture, which requires GP and cooldown. Additionally, as the cumulative capture count of a zone increases, the time required for capture will continuously increase.
guideHqContent: The central anchor of all player activities. Links you to Remote Mode. If you change your actual physical location, you can relocate your base in the profile settings.
guideGoldContent: Gold GP accumulates automatically relative to your total captured territories over time. Securing and protecting more land enables larger strategic operations.
guideShieldContent: Upon capturing a zone, a defense shield activates for a limited time to protect your territory from being recaptured by other players.
guideRevealContent: During Remote Mode, you can spend GP to decrypt and reveal hidden security details, such as the zone's owner and shield duration.
guideAlertContent: Receive instant warning push notifications and on-screen alerts if your main base is captured or you lose territory.
